title: Mehndi Ceremony
description: Join us for an afternoon of beautiful henna art, music, and celebration as we begin our wedding festivities.

title: Haldi Ceremony
description: A sacred ritual of turmeric blessings. Come dressed in yellow and prepare for some fun!

title: Sangeet Night
description: An evening of dance, music, and unforgettable performances. Get ready to dance the night away!

title: Wedding Ceremony
description: The moment we've been waiting for. Join us as we take our vows and begin our forever together.

title: Grand Reception
description: Celebrate with us at a grand reception filled with gourmet dining, live music, and dancing.
